questionText: Which real estate and/or construction activities does your organization engage in?
questionKo: 귀사가 참여하는 real estate 및/또는 construction activities을/를 선택하십시오.
simpleHelp: Information about the activities your organization engages in helps data users to contextualize and interpret your responses. Selections made in this question will drive the subsequent questions.
baseOptions: New construction or major renovation of buildings
Other real estate or construction activities, please specify

guidance.text:
General 
Select all real estate and/or construction activities your organization engages in.
guidance.textKo: 일반 Select all real estate 및/또는 construction activities 귀사 engages in.

guidance.text:
New construction : Development of new buildings and additions to existing buildings that affect usable space.
Major renovations: Alterations that affect more than 50 percent of the total building floor area or cause relocation of more than 50 percent of regular building occupants.
Buildings management: refers to both managed and indirectly managed assets where construction work has been completed. Managed assets or buildings are those for which the landlord is determined to have "operational control", where operational control is defined as having the ability to introduce and implement operating policies, health and safety policies, and/or environmental policies. Where a tenant has the greatest authority to introduce and implement such policies, the tenant has operational control, meaning that the asset is indirectly managed.
guidance.textKo: 신규 construction: Development of 신규 buildings 및 additions to existing buildings that affect usable space. Major renovations: Alterations that affect more than 50 percent 의 total building floor area 또는 cause relocation of more than 50 percent of regular building occupants. Buildings 관리: refers to both managed 및 indirectly managed 자산 여기서 construction work has been 완성. Managed 자산 또는 buildings are those for which the landlord is determined to have "operational control", 여기서 operational control is defined as having the ability to introduce 및 implement operating policies, health 및 safety policies, 및/또는 environmental policies. 여기서 a tenant has the greatest authority to introduce 및 implement such policies, the tenant has operational control, meaning that the asset is indirectly managed.

A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)

A maximum of 0/28 points is available for this route.
